params.SpellDescription: Add one mana of any color. When you spend this mana to cast a Dragon creature spell, it enters with an additional +1/+1 counter on it and gains hexproof until your next turn.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Add one mana of any color. When you spend this mana to cast a Dragon creature spell, it enters with an additional +1/+1 counter on it and gains hexproof until your next turn.
